visuals.title: Blockchain Tiers Spectrum
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Blockchain Tiers Spectrum
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Tiers and Types of Blockchain
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Tier 1: Public Blockchains -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="120" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Tier 1: Public
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Tier 2: Private Blockchains -->
  <rect x="50" y="140" width="120" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Tier 2: Private
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Tier 3: Consortium Blockchains -->
  <rect x="50" y="220" width="120" height="60" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Tier 3: Consortium
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Examples for Public -->
  <rect x="190" y="60" width="180" height="60" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="5" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Bitcoin, Ethereum
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="280" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    (Permissionless)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Examples for Private -->
  <rect x="190" y="140" width="180" height="60" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="5" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    Hyperledger Fabric
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="280" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    (Permissioned)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Examples for Consortium -->
  <rect x="190" y="220" width="180" height="60" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="5" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="235" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    R3 Corda, B3i
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="280" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    (Multi-organization)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Connecting arrows -->
  <line x1="170" y1="90" x2="190" y2="90" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="170" y1="170" x2="190" y2="170" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="170" y1="250" x2="190" y2="250" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
</svg>
